title: cheilanthes incana
intro: Cheilanthes incana, also known as the icy fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Cheilanthes genus and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Cheilanthes incana has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
